name: Penalty Rivals
author: Poki
description: Penalty Rivals is a soccer game where your task is to outscore your opponent to win! Choose your favorite uniform, go head-to-head with your opponent, and aim to score goals! Pay close attention to the goalkeeper's movements and wait for the perfect moment to take your shot! The outcome of the match is in your hands. Can you uphold your team's honor and win the match? How to play Penalty Rivals? Swipe to kick! Who created Penalty Rivals? Penalty Rivals is created by Happylander Ltd. Play their other games on Poki: Bowling Champion , Bottle Flip Challenge ! How can I play Penalty Rivals for free? You can play Penalty Rivals for free on Poki. Can I play Penalty Rivals on mobile devices and desktop? Penalty Rivals can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
